nl_query: What is the faculty-to-course ratio per department?
failed_sql: SELECT au.id, au.code, au.name, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.id) AS faculty_count, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS academic_unit_count, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT fc.id)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT au.id), 0), 2) AS ratio FROM academic_unit au JOIN academic_unit_closure c ON c.ancestor_id = au.id AND c.depth > 0 JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.department_id = au.id WHERE au.unit_type = 'DEPARTMENT' GROUP BY au.id, au.code, au.name ORDER BY ratio DESC;
error: Validation failed (aggregation): GROUP BY uses a descriptive column (like name, title, or code) without including the primary key (id). Names and titles may not be unique. Always include the entity's 'id' column in the GROUP BY clause alongside the descriptive column.
